author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Umbrella Cargo.toml only depends on 5 crates: core, nn, optim, data, vision. Missing: gpu, cubecl, train, serialize, distributed, distributions, profiler, hub, jit, nn-derive. lib.rs only re-exports core, nn, optim — missing data, vision, train, serialize, distributed, distributions, profiler, hub, jit, gpu submodules.
